ksa_text: Knowledge of data lineage concepts and documentation methods, including end-to-end lineage from source to consumption, transformation-level lineage, lineage visualization, and impact analysis use cases for data change management.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality with role-relevant signals (2) is market-supported. Final decision: include.
